title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES NAMED THE TOP AIRLINE FOR JOB GROWTH AND OPPORTUNITY BY THE AMERICAN OPPORTUNITY INDEX
text: Index ranks best workplaces in America for Employees to advance their careers   DALLAS , Dec. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) is proud of its recognition as an Employer Honoree on the 2023 American Opportunity Index, a ranking that measures the effectiveness of companies in developing talent to drive business performance and advance individual Employees' careers. Southwest® ranked as the top airline on the Index for the second consecutive year.

title: Southwest pilots win significant pay raise in tentative deal valued at $12B
text: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) pilots have secured a new tentative contract agreement that includes improved compensation and conditions after more than three years of negotiations. The Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) Pilots Association (SWAPA) board, which represents about 11,000 of the airline's pilots, on Wednesday approved the tentative agreement.

title: Southwest Pilots Will Get 50% Pay Raise Over 5 Years In Tentative Union Agreement
text: The board of directors of the Southwest Airlines Pilots Association approved a tentative agreement with Southwest on Wednesday in which pilots will receive a 50% pay increase over five years, multiple outlets reported, following large raises for pilots with Delta, United and American Airlines.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES PILOTS TO VOTE ON FIVE-YEAR AGREEMENT
text: DALLAS , Dec. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) announced today that a Tentative Agreement has been reached with the Southwest Airlines Pilots Association (SWAPA) and will be voted on by the airline's nearly 11,000 Pilots. "Our Pilots are exemplary aviators, and this agreement would give them industry-leading pay rates, and numerous quality-of-life enhancements, while also providing opportunities for operational efficiencies," said Adam Carlisle , Vice President Labor Relations at Southwest Airlines®.

title: Southwest Pilots Union Members to Vote on $12 Billion Deal

title: Southwest pilots would land big pay hike in tentative deal
text: Southwest Airlines Co.'s LUV, -0.90% pilots union on Wednesday said its 11,000-plus members would vote on a tentative agreement with the airline for a big pay hike and better benefits. The pilots will be voting on the tentative deal until Jan. 22, after the board of the union, the Southwest Airlines Pilots Association, voted on Wednesday to send the tentative agreement to the pilots for consideration.

title: Southwest Airlines pilots reach agreement for $12 billion contract
text: CHICAGO, Dec 19 (Reuters) - Negotiators for pilots at Southwest Airlines (LUV.N) have reached an agreement in principle with the company for a new five-year contract worth $12 billion, the union said on Tuesday, adding that its board still needs to decide whether to send the deal to members for a ratification vote.

title: Southwest And Pilots' Union Reach Labor Agreement In Principle After Years Of Negotiations

title: Southwest Airlines fined record $140M over 2022 holiday disruptions
text: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) has been handed a $140 million fine from the U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT) for violations of consumer protection laws during and after operational failures during the 2022 holiday season.

title: U.S. DOT Fines Southwest Airlines $140 Million For 2022 Christmas Fail
text: The U.S. Department of Transportation imposed a substantial $140 million fine on Southwest Airlines LUV for breaches of consumer protection laws during the 2022 Christmas period. This unprecedented fine, dwarfing any previous penalties by 30 times, is on top of the over $600 million in refunds and reimbursements that the DOT DOT ensured Southwest provided its passengers.

title: Southwest's stock selloff helps drag down shares of airline peers
text: The airline sector was feeling some turbulence Monday, in the wake of Southwest Airlines Co.'s LUV, -1.63% agreement to pay $140 million to settle a federal investigation into last year's holiday-travel debacle. The U.S. Global Jets ETF JETS, -1.25% dropped 1.1%, while the S&P 500 SPX, +0.29% gained 0.3%, as Southwest shares shed 1.2%.

title: Southwest Airlines agrees to $140M penalty over 2022 holiday meltdown: ‘We messed up'

title: Southwest's Paying $140 Million for Last Year's Holiday Flight Chaos. Why It ‘Will Never Happen Again.

title: Southwest Airlines CEO says 2022 holiday season debacle 'will never happen again'

title: Southwest Airlines shares fall on raised 4Q fuel cost expectations

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES ANNOUNCES POINTS FOR A PURPOSE HOLIDAY PROMOTION FOR RAPID REWARDS MEMBERS
text: Donate $25 or more to select nonprofit organizations, earn 10 Rapid Rewards points per dollar, and Southwest Airlines will match the number of points in the nonprofit's account DALLAS , Dec. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) announced the Points for a Purpose Holiday Promotion offering Rapid Rewards® Members a special incentive to increase their giving impact by donating to select nonprofits starting Dec. 1, 2023, and running through Dec. 14, 2023. This promotion allows Customers to donate cash to one of the airline's nonprofit partners while earning points—Customers can earn 10 Rapid Rewards points for every dollar* donated, and Southwest® will match the number of points in the nonprofit's account.
